Off Calendar Apr-09-2025 Off Calendar

Petition To Enforce Money Judgment By Collecting Trust Income Or Principal Due To Judgment Debtor As Trust Beneficiary
Off Calendar Apr-09-2025 Continued To May-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Riddell for Alicia Minero, Angela Minero, Gina Lange, Manuel Jerry Minero, and Cameron Steele, Objectors (via Zoom).
Jeremy Liem for Pasquale Conte, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Rowena Navia for John Belquist, Trustee (via Zoom).

Mr. Liem argued that documentation substantiating the timing and nature of distributions to Mr. Steele had not been produced, despite assurances at a prior hearing. He requested canceled checks or equivalent proof in lieu of declarations. Ms. Navia and Mr. Riddell responded that all declarations were executed under penalty of perjury and confirmed Mr. Steele received his share.

Mr. Liem agreed to dismiss the petition if provided with documentation confirming the distribution of Mr. Steele's share occurred before notice of the judgment lien.

The court continued the petition to enforce money judgment to May 21, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. Mr. Riddell and Ms. Navia were directed to meet and confer and provide Mr. Liem with copies documentation confirming distribution to Mr. Steele. Mr. Liem shall either file a dismissal on or before May 7, 2025, or file a supplement explaining why the petition should not be dismissed.

The remaining underlying petitions were taken off calendar by the court.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Order Confirming Appointment Of Successor Trustee And Instructing The Trustee [Cal. Probate Code Section 17200]
Off Calendar Feb-26-2025 Continued To Apr-09-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Michael J. Riddell, Esq., for Alicia Minero, Angela Minero, Gina Lange, Manuel Jerry Minero, and Cameron Steele, Petitioners.

Pete Allen Steele, in propria persona, interested party.

Jeremy Liem, Esq., for Pasquale Conte, Petitioner.

Rowena Navia, Esq., for John Balquist, Trustee.

At the outset, the court enquires regarding any payments or distributions that have been made. Mr. Riddell reports that the Trustee and all Beneficiaries have reached a settlement and release agreement. The court acknowledges the Notice of Withdrawals of the Petition to Appoint Successor Trustee to Fill Vacancy and Amended Petition for Order Re: Distribution. The court advises that it is considering taking the preceding off calendar pursuant to the Notices of Withdrawal. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding this matter and the court's suggestion. Mr. Liem reminds the court of his client's pending petition which is currently set for hearing on Apr-09-2025 in this Department. The court and the parties discuss the preceding and agree to continue all subject matters on today's calendar to be heard alongside the preceding petition if needed. At Mr. Riddell's request, Mr. Steele consents to withdraw his petition and objections to Mr. Riddell's petition in open court, pursuant to the above-referenced settlement agreement.

All matters are continued to Apr-09-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Loke. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Jul-01-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Riddell appeared by zoom for petitioners.

The court noted that no one else was present. Mr. Riddell stated that they mediated, but they did not resolve the matter, and that he will be filing a petition for an accounting and for distribution pursuant to the terms of the trust and to the amendment. Mr. Riddell also stated that half of the property was community property, that half will be distributed pursuant to the original trust and that the other half will be distributed pursuant to the amendment, that he hopes to finish his petition this week and that Mr. Balquist sold the house. Status of mediation is off calendar. The Petition to Appoint Successor Trustee to Fill Vacancy, etc., and the Petition for Order Confirming Appointment of Successor Trustee, etc. are continued to August 26, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Riddell's petition is to be given a hearing date of August 26, 2024.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Appointment Of Successor Trustee And Instructing The Trustee [Cal. Probate Code Section 17200]
Off Calendar Jul-01-2024 Continued To Aug-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-08-2024 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Confirming Appointment Of Successor Trustee And Instructing The Trustee [Cal. Probate Code Section 17200]
Off Calendar Apr-08-2024 Continued To Jul-01-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Riddell appeared by zoom for and with Alicia Minero by zoom, Gina Lange by zoom, and for Angela Minero and Manuel Minero (petitioners).
Pete Steele appeared by zoom in propria persona.
Cameron Steele appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Pete Steele stated that he will go through mediation and then he will consider hiring an attorney. The Court ordered the parties to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than May 20, 2024. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by June 24, 2024. The Petition for Order Confirming Appointment of Successor Trustee, etc., and the Petition to Appoint Successor Trustee to Fill Vacancy are continued to and the Parties are to return on July 1, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The order to show cause issued to Pete Steele is off calendar. The parties are to obtain a copy of the mediation order from the court's website.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Appointment Of Successor Trustee And Instructing The Trustee [Cal. Probate Code Section 17200]
Off Calendar Mar-11-2024 Continued To Apr-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Michael Riddell, Esq., for Objectors.

Mr. Riddell notes that there are Substitutions of Attorney for all Objectors, pending in the e-filing queue. The court notes that Pete Steele is not in attendance at today's hearing. Mr. Riddell briefly offers his position regarding the subject matters, stating that the amendment is valid and thus he believes the Trust's the real property was separate property which was deeded to the Trust in 2005. The court acknowledges the preceding and counsel is advised that the court would like counsel to file formal documentation of the above.

After additional discussion, the subject matters are continued to Apr-08-2024 at 9:00 a.m. An Order to Appear will be issued to Pete Steele, Petitioner in propria persona, to appear on Apr-08-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. to explain the failure to appear.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Appointment Of Successor Trustee And Instructing The Trustee [Cal. Probate Code Section 17200]
Off Calendar Dec-20-2023 Continued To Jan-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Alexander Johnson appeared via zoom for and with Cameron Steele(petitioner).
Pete Steele (pro per) appeared via zoom (Objector).

Discussion was held regarding the current insurance issues with the property, that the current insurance company will not insure the property due to roofing issues, that the property is the sole asset of the trust, and that Mr. Steele said he is willing to cover the cost to pay for the repairs. The Court instructs parties to clear the procedural issues before the next hearing. Both matters are continued to January 29, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status for request to appoint temporary successor trustee is also set for the same date.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Dec-07-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Marlene Sanborn, Esq., for Pete Steele, Respondent.

No other appearances.

At the outset, the court mentions that the Notice of Hearing on file re the subject matter did not include Remote Access Information. Counsel confirms that Mr. Steele has been provided the Remote Access Information and reports that she has not heard from her client for some time.

After additional discussion, the court advises that it intends to grant Attorney's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel. The court instructs counsel to provide notice to Mr. Steele re the Dec-20-2023 hearing, making certain to include this court's Remote Access Information.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.
APPLICATION FOR ORDER SHORTENING TIME ON NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL
